mnemonics: The Manager Controls Data (MCD): Metadata, Control, Data Quality
keyPoints: Manages metadata for data lineage and definitions
Controls ETL jobs, scheduling, and system performance
Enforces data quality, security, and audit policies
commonMistakes: Focusing only on storage and ignoring management tools
Neglecting data quality controls which leads to 'garbage in, garbage out'
Underestimating the importance of metadata management for data understanding
